concerns.text: The idea explicitly calls for moderator analyses of anxiety subtype, intervention dose, and therapist guidance. FR-009 only triggers moderator analysis when I² > 75% and limits moderators to anxiety subtype, hardware type, and session count, omitting dose (if not equated with session count) and therapist guidance. This under‑reaches the required scope of the research question.

The search requirement (FR-001) does not explicitly require that the comparator arm be an in‑person exposure therapy condition, which is central to the comparative efficacy question posed in the idea.
